questions.question: Describe the architecture of a binary half adder using HDL. What are the inputs and outputs?
questions.hint: A half adder should include an XOR gate to represent the addition of two bits.

questions.question: Write a VHDL code snippet to implement a 4-bit full adder. Ensure to include the necessary inputs and outputs.
questions.hint: Use the `xor` and `nand` gates to implement the full addition process.

questions.question: A 5-bit adder is being designed in Verilog. The adder should have the following inputs and outputs: A4, A3, A2, A1, A0, B4, B3, B2, B1, B0. What are the minimum required inputs to the adder?
questions.hint: The inputs should include the carry-in (Ci) and the two bits of the first adder (A4 and A3).
